summary: Iteration 78: Split Payment Recording Fix - Backend (10/10 tests PASS). Verified that split payments are correctly tracked: cash portion added to Cash Sales (total_cash_in), digital portion to Digital Sales (total_digital_today). Backend APIs return correct values for 2026-02-26 IPIL branch: total_cash_sales=3600, total_split_cash=3366, total_cash_in=6966, total_digital_today=5814, grand_total=15980. Frontend code review confirms Step 5 and Step 7 conditionally display 'Split Cash Portion' when total_split_cash > 0.

tests: Returns total_split_cash field (3366 for test date)
total_digital_today correctly reflects only digital portions (5814)
digital_sales_today list shows fund_source='split' for split payments
Returns total_split_cash field for batch dates

details: Line 1084-1088: Conditionally shows 'Split Cash Portion' box when total_split_cash > 0
Uses teal color scheme (bg-teal-50, text-teal-700) to distinguish from other cash categories
Line 1226-1227: Shows '+ Split Cash Portion' line in Cash Drawer Reconciliation

test_categories: Daily Close Preview (4 tests): total_split_cash field, value, total_cash_in calculation, digital excludes split cash
Sales History By Date (2 tests): totals section structure, cash includes split portions
Batch Close Preview (2 tests): returns split_cash field, total_cash_in includes split
Close Endpoint (1 test): endpoint accessible and validates
Code Review Verification (1 test): preview query returns split invoice data

critical_code_review_comments: Backend daily_operations.py correctly queries split invoices separately (line 286-291) to get cash_amount
total_cash_in formula correct: cash_sales + partial_cash + ar_received + split_cash (line 293)
invoices.py history/by-date correctly splits totals - adds cash_amount to cash_total, digital_amount to digital_total (lines 759-764)
Frontend CloseWizardPage.js conditionally renders Split Cash Portion only when value > 0 (lines 1084, 1226)

test_credentials.test_date: 2026-02-26 (has split payments with cash_amount and digital_amount)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing IPIL BRANCH data with split payment invoices
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 78 verified the split payment recording fix. Key findings: 1) Backend correctly returns total_split_cash (3366) in daily-close-preview and batch preview, 2) total_cash_in correctly includes split_cash in calculation (3600+3366=6966), 3) total_digital_today (5814) only counts digital portions of split payments, 4) Sales history totals correctly split: cash=6966, digital=5814, credit=3200, grand=15980. Frontend code verified to conditionally display 'Split Cash Portion' box in Step 5 and Z-Report (Step 7) when total_split_cash > 0. NOTE: Did NOT close any days - only tested preview/history endpoints per requirements.
